race.comment: DRAMATICUS (3) brought strong form to resumption at Morphettville Parks and couldn't quite get the job done as favourite in a 66. He is sure to improve and can race forward from the inside barrier. John Allen replaces the 3kg apprentice, and he's going to be hard to beat. ALLINTHETIMING (1) scored last start over 1200m at Mt Gambier in a 66 to make it two wins from four starts this campaign. Raced well at Wangaratta (BM70) and Pakenham the two prior, and despite top weight, has to be respected. LETHAL THOUGHTS (2) has been busting to win at this level. Hasn't saluted for a long while, but he gets in well with the 4kg claim, and it's hard to risk the premier stable. OLATUNDE (6) went back early from his wide draw over 1400m at Albury last time in stronger and had too much to do. Went close in the two before, and Coffey goes aboard and has had two jumpout wins on the gelding. He can go a lot better.
